IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17812897.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced HR leader with a strong track record in managing human resources, implementing policies and programs, and fostering a positive work environment. Skilled in recruitment, benefits administration, performance management, and organizational development.
SKILLS: Benefits Administration, Performance Management, Organizational Development, Recruitment, Employee Relations, Policies and Programs Implementation, Leadership, Management Reporting, Conflict Resolution, Continuous Improvement, Decision Making
